# ConversionUnit enumeration

The unit of a [`PerPoint`](./CoreStatConversion/PerPoint.md) coefficient.

```csharp
public enum ConversionUnit
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Flat | `0` | A flat additive amount (e.g. Armor, Resistance points). |
| Percent | `1` | A percentage-point amount (e.g. Skill Damage %, Dodge %). |
